universalEdges.evidence: Databricks Q1: daily_log_manpower records 30+ trades at 10+ companies each. Any trade present on site is tracked.
Timecards capture hours for every trade on site
Crews are organized for every trade
Employee records enroll workers from every trade
Workforce requests can be made for any trade
Work assignments deploy workers from any trade
Scheduled work plans for any trade or equipment
Scheduled work assigns equipment to planned activities
Peak daily headcount measured for every trade
Average daily headcount measured for every trade
Field productivity benchmarked for every trade
Productivity is measured for every trade on site
Plan percent complete gauged for every trade
Daily log header establishes scope for all trade entries
Construction report aggregates all trades' headcount and work
Daily report distributed referencing all trades on site
Databricks Q1: safety violations can be issued against any trade — 30+ confirmed
Safety violations can cite any equipment involved in an infraction
Accident logs record incidents involving any trade
Accident logs record incidents involving any equipment
Equipment log entries track any equipment active on site
Equipment master catalogs every type of equipment
Equipment timecards capture hours for all equipment
Equipment utilization rated for all equipment types
Delivery logs document arrival of any material to site
Material shipments track inbound loads for any material
Material receipts verify quantity and condition of any delivery
Databricks: daily_log_delay has 84K material delay records — any material can cause delays
Equipment unavailability can cause work stoppages
Delay frequency counted for any material that causes shortages
Daily log inspections check quality of any installed material
Daily log notes document activities involving any trade
Daily log notes document equipment activity
Daily log notes document material placements and deliveries
Waste logs record disposal of scraps from any material
Waste diversion rates calculated for any material type
Quantity logs track installed-in-place quantities for any material
Actual production quantities captured for any material being placed
Budgeted production targets set for any material

verbGlossary.TRACKS HEADCOUNT OF: {source} records headcount, hours, or presence of {target} on site for a given day
verbGlossary.LOGS HOURS FOR: {source} captures billable hours worked by {target} or machine
verbGlossary.ORGANIZES CREWS FOR: {source} groups individual workers into a named field crew for {target}
verbGlossary.REGISTERS WORKERS FROM: {source} enrolls a worker into the project workforce roster for {target}
verbGlossary.REQUESTS WORKERS FROM: {source} signals a need for additional {target} workers on an upcoming work day
verbGlossary.DEPLOYS WORKERS FROM: {source} dispatches {target} to a scheduled task or work area
verbGlossary.SCHEDULES WORK FOR: {source} assigns {target} to a planned activity for that day
verbGlossary.SCHEDULES USE OF: {source} assigns {target} to a planned activity for that day
verbGlossary.MEASURES HEADCOUNT OF: {source} quantifies headcount or output rate of {target}
verbGlossary.BENCHMARKS PRODUCTIVITY OF: {source} compares {target}'s output rate against planned or historical norms
verbGlossary.GAUGES PLAN COMPLETION FOR: {target} evaluates whether {source}'s work is on track
verbGlossary.COVERS DAILY ENTRIES FOR: {target} establishes the date scope under which {source} entries are recorded
verbGlossary.SUMMARIZES DAILY ACTIVITY OF: {source} aggregates headcount, usage, and work completed by {target}
verbGlossary.DISTRIBUTES REPORT ON: {source} sends a compiled field summary referencing {target} to stakeholders
verbGlossary.CITES VIOLATION BY: {source} names {target} as the party involved in a safety infraction
verbGlossary.CITES VIOLATION INVOLVING: {source} names {target} as involved in a safety infraction
verbGlossary.RECORDS INCIDENT INVOLVING: {source} documents {target} involvement in an on-site injury or incident
verbGlossary.LOGS DAILY ACTIVITY OF: {source} records that {target} was present and active on site that day
verbGlossary.CATALOGS ASSETS FOR: {source} defines the asset identity, specifications, and ownership for {target}
verbGlossary.RECEIVES DELIVERY OF: {source} documents that {target} arrived on site and was accepted
verbGlossary.SHIPS LOAD OF: {source} tracks an inbound load of {target} from fabrication shop or supplier
verbGlossary.VERIFIES RECEIPT OF: {source} confirms delivered quantity, condition, and spec compliance for {target}
verbGlossary.DELAYED BY SHORTAGE OF: {source} attributes a work stoppage to a missing or late {target}
verbGlossary.DELAYED BY UNAVAILABILITY OF: {source} attributes a work stoppage to unavailable {target}
verbGlossary.COUNTS DELAY FREQUENCY FOR: {source} tallies how often {target} shortage causes field delays
verbGlossary.INSPECTS INSTALLATION OF: {source} checks quality or placement of {target} in the field
verbGlossary.DOCUMENTS ACTIVITY OF: {source} describes {target}'s activity or equipment operation in narrative form
verbGlossary.DOCUMENTS PLACEMENT OF: {source} describes {target} placement or delivery in narrative form
verbGlossary.DISPOSES WASTE FROM: {source} records scraps or debris from {target} removed from the site
verbGlossary.RATES WASTE DIVERSION OF: {source} calculates the recycled vs. landfilled percentage for {target} type
verbGlossary.TALLIES INSTALLED QUANTITY OF: {source} records installed-in-place quantities of {target} for progress tracking
verbGlossary.QUANTIFIES PRODUCTION OF: {source} captures the real volume of {target} placed in a shift
verbGlossary.TARGETS PRODUCTION OF: {target} sets the planned volume of {source} to be placed
verbGlossary.BILLS LABOR OF: {source} records labor usage of {target} for cost reimbursement
verbGlossary.BILLS USAGE OF: {source} records usage of {target} for cost reimbursement
verbGlossary.BILLS QUANTITY OF: {source} records quantity of {target} used for cost reimbursement
verbGlossary.CAPTURES COST OF: {source} bundles labor, equipment, and material line items for {target} into a single billable record
verbGlossary.OPERATES EQUIPMENT FOR: {target} provides the skilled labor that runs {source}
verbGlossary.ISSUES REPORT ON: {source} authors a safety violation or corrective action notice for {target}
verbGlossary.INVESTIGATES INCIDENT IN: {target} conducts a root-cause investigation of an incident involving {source}
verbGlossary.CONDUCTS INSPECTION IN: {target} carries out a field inspection of {source} recorded in the daily log
verbGlossary.PERFORMS INSPECTION IN: {target} executes a daily log inspection of {source} against a checklist or spec
verbGlossary.VALIDATES QUANTITIES IN: {source} confirms field productivity measurements for {target} against control points
verbGlossary.WITNESSES INSPECTION IN: {source} observes and signs off on a field inspection or system test for {target}
verbGlossary.SUPPORTS OPERATIONS IN: {target} provides power, water, or lighting that enables daily field operations for {source}
verbGlossary.UNLOADS DELIVERIES FOR: {source} offloads deliveries and stages {target} at the installation point
verbGlossary.NOTIFIES UPON COMPLETION: {source} triggers notifications to {target} about log completion
verbGlossary.COORDINATES DELIVERY OF: {source} documents coordination calls about schedules or deliveries of {target}
verbGlossary.DISTRIBUTES REVISION TO: {source} confirms updated drawing set delivered to {target} on site
verbGlossary.CONFIGURES LOG SECTIONS FOR: {source} defines which resource-tracking sections are active for {target}
verbGlossary.LINKS SCHEDULE ACTIVITY TO: {target} connects a daily field entry to a CPM schedule activity for {source}
verbGlossary.RESTRICTS OPERATION OF: {source} flags conditions that shut down or limit operation of {target}
verbGlossary.RATES WEATHER IMPACT ON: {target} measures how often weather disrupts {source} operations
verbGlossary.HAULS WASTE FROM: {source} tracks a load of construction debris from {target} hauled off site

_meta.universalEdgeSemantics: Each universalEdge means: the source element connects to EVERY element in the targetGroup via the specified verb. targetGroup values: 'trades' (25 elements), 'equipment' (11 elements), 'materials' (25 elements), 'measures' (9 elements).
_meta.dataEvidence: Universal relationships validated via Databricks queries against prod_gold_ram_us01 (2-year lookback, March 2026). Q1: manpower × 30+ trades. Material delays: 84K records, 4,351 cos.
_meta.edgesVsUniversal: The 'edges' array contains SELECTIVE relationships — specific role-to-activity connections (e.g., safety professional issues violations, QC inspector performs inspections) and weather/equipment-specific links.
